# Pull Request

## Summary

Explain what this PR changes and why. Keep it technical and concise.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed?
Examples:

- Fixes a bug
- Improves ingestion accuracy
- Adds missing schema fields
- Updates documentation
- Improves cross‑engine compatibility

## Changes

List the key changes in this PR.

- [ ] Change 1
- [ ] Change 2
- [ ] Change 3

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change.

- Engine(s) tested:
  - SQLite
  - MariaDB
  - PostgreSQL
  - MSSQL
- Ingestion tested on:
  - Small dataset
  - Full dataset
- Verified schema creation
- Verified inserts
- Verified null handling

## Documentation

If this PR changes behavior, confirm you updated:

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Schema documentation
- [ ] JSDoc typedefs
- [ ] Comments in ingestion functions

## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] Code follows project style (StandardJS, no semicolons, tabs)
- [ ] PR is focused and scoped
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] No debug logs left behind
- [ ] No trailing whitespace
- [ ] All tests pass

## Related Issues

Link any related issues here.

Closes #
